'''ngahuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tables|tables]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tables|tables]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngahuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæhihith|ngæhihith]] || [[word:ngæhihij|ngæhihij]] || [[word:ngæhihish|ngæhihish]] || [[word:ngæhihi|ngæhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngahuhuhuth|ngahuhuhuth]] || [[word:ngahuhuhuj|ngahuhuhuj]] || [[word:ngahuhuhush|ngahuhuhush]] || [[word:ngahuhuhu|ngahuhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngahuhuth|ngahuhuth]] || [[word:ngahuhuj|ngahuhuj]] || [[word:ngahuhush|ngahuhush]] || [[word:ngahuhu|ngahuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngahufhuth|ngahufhuth]] || [[word:ngahufhuj|ngahufhuj]] || [[word:ngahufhush|ngahufhush]] || [[word:ngahufhuf|ngahufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngahuhuthu|ngahuhuthu]] || [[word:ngahuhuju|ngahuhuju]] || [[word:ngahuhushu|ngahuhushu]] || [[word:ngahuhuku|ngahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngahuhuth|ngahuhuth]] || [[word:ngahuhuj|ngahuhuj]] || [[word:ngahuhush|ngahuhush]] || [[word:ngahuhu|ngahuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngahuhuthul|ngahuhuthul]] || [[word:ngahuhujul|ngahuhujul]] || [[word:ngahuhushul|ngahuhushul]] || [[word:ngahuhukul|ngahuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngahuhuthuthu|ngahuhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngahuhujuju|ngahuhujuju]] || [[word:ngahuhushushu|ngahuhushushu]] || [[word:ngahuhuku|ngahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngahuhuthun|ngahuhuthun]] || [[word:ngahuhujun|ngahuhujun]] || [[word:ngahuhushun|ngahuhushun]] || [[word:ngahuhukun|ngahuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngahuhuthuoro|ngahuhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngahuhujuoro|ngahuhujuoro]] || [[word:ngahuhushuoro|ngahuhushuoro]] || [[word:ngahuhukuoro|ngahuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
